data.title: BLS International secures 3-year contract to run Indian Visa Application Centres in China for Ministry of External Affairs, India.
data.description: BLS International, based in New Delhi, India, has secured a significant contract from the Ministry of External Affairs, Government of India. The prestigious contract spans three years and underscores the company's commitment to providing essential services.

data.title: HPE and Ericsson set up lab for telco providers, validating dual-mode 5G core solution, helping deploy efficient networks.
data.description: Houston and Stockholm - HPE (Hewlett Packard Enterprise), with the ticker symbol HPE on NYSE, and Ericsson have revealed a new joint validation lab to address key obstacles encountered by telecommunication service providers. The lab aims to assist in the deployment of a multi-vendor infrastructure stack. This collaboration seeks to validate a cloud-native, artificial intelligence-driven, dual-mode 5G core solution. Telecommunication companies are increasingly required to set up robust, scalable, and productive networks while handling the challenges of implementing new technologies.

data.title: Rain partners with Paylocity, providing EWA solution to 41,650 Paylocity clients, benefitting 3.5M workers.
data.description: In Los Angeles today, Rain, a prominent provider of earned wage access (EWA) solutions, unveiled its latest integration with Paylocity, a top HR, payroll, and spend management platform. The collaboration means that Paylocity's vast network of 41,650 clients will now be able to utilize a seamless earned wage access solution available through the platform's integrations marketplace. This innovative bi-directional integration allows the employees of Paylocity customers to join the 3.5 million workers who already benefit from Rain's services.

data.title: Indji Systems Inc. secures new U.S. patent (US12380794B2) for "Alert Generation System and Method" for renewable energy and utility networks.
data.description: In Los Angeles, Indji Systems Inc. unveiled that the U.S. Patent and Trademark Office has approved US12380794B2, labeled "Alert Generation System and Method," adding to their intellectual property portfolio that includes US10089854B2. This patent offers enhanced protection for advancements that support renewable energy and electrical network operators nationwide. The Indji Watch™ SaaS platform by Indji Systems Inc. remains a leader in the market.

data.title: Bermuda updates laws (Trustee Amendment Act 2025, Benefit Entities Act 2025) to promote responsible wealth stewardship.
data.description: Bermuda has recently passed two significant acts - the Trustee Amendment Act 2025 and the Benefit Entities Act 2025. These acts, effective as of October 16, 2025, aim to facilitate wealth and business owners in creating long-term resilience through sustainable business practices and responsible investing within trusts. This development presents an opportunity for individuals and entities to engage in more sustainable and responsible economic activities.

data.title: Five individuals in London have been arrested as part of a crypto fraud investigation involving $1.3 million.
data.description: In a recent report, it was revealed that total global greenhouse gas emissions have reached a record high of over 55 billion metric tons in the past year. This marks a significant increase despite efforts to reduce carbon pollution. The data shows that the largest contributors to these emissions include China, the United States, and the European Union. It is estimated that these emissions are responsible for driving global temperatures higher, leading to more frequent and severe climate-related events. The findings underscore the urgent need for stronger international cooperation and immediate action to curb emissions and combat climate change.

data.title: Ripple acquires GTreasury for $1 billion, expanding into corporate treasury market and targeting large corporate customers.
data.description: In San Francisco, Ripple, a prominent digital asset infrastructure provider for businesses, revealed its acquisition of GTreasury, the top treasury management systems company, for a noteworthy $1 billion. This acquisition signifies a substantial growth opportunity for Ripple, granting access to the extensive multi-trillion dollar corporate treasury market and a wide array of major corporate clients. With over 40 years of expertise in aiding treasury operations, GTreasury's acquisition positions Ripple for notable expansion in the industry.

data.title: Harkness Capital Partners sells Cenavera Nutrition to Nautic Partners. Cenavera is largest foodservice provider to K-12 schools.
data.description: Harkness Capital Partners has recently completed the sale of Cenavera Nutrition to Nautic Partners in New York. Cenavera Nutrition, the leading independent outsourced foodservice provider to K-12 schools, was under the ownership of Harkness Capital Partners. The transaction involved Cenavera, founded in 2004 and headquartered in Scottsdale, Arizona. Harkness Capital Partners, now operating with its second fund, Harkness Capital Partners II (HCP II), facilitated this sale. Cenavera serves public, private, and charter schools K-12, being a significant player in this sector.

data.title: 7EDGE reduced cloud costs by using serverless and event-driven architecture while modernizing a global safety compliance platform.
data.description: Located in Bengaluru, India, on October 16, 2025, 7EDGE, a Digital Product Engineering Company, unveiled their successful modernization of a worldwide safety compliance platform. The company introduced a cutting-edge solution built on AWS technology, emphasizing mobile accessibility, serverless functionality, and event-driven architecture.

data.title: Stefanini's Natalia Chiritescu wins Bronze Luminary at ISG Women in Digital Awards EMEA for AI Leadership, highlighting AI impact.
data.description: In Brussels, at the Women in Digital Awards in EMEA, Stefanini was recognized by Information Services Group (ISG), celebrating Natalia Chiritescu, the Digital Solutions Center (DSC) Director for EMEA, NA, & APAC. She received the "Bronze Luminary" award in the AI Champion category for her contributions to AI adoption and enablement impact. The ISG Women in Digital Awards program, which began in the Americas in 2022, was extended in 2023 to cover Europe, Middle East, Africa (EMEA), and Asia Pacific.
